_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
**TRACE-DM — No EPR/producer registration scheme; operator connectivity registration is the operative requirement.**

TRACE-DM is not an Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) or producer registration scheme in the classical sense. It does not require waste generators (citizens) to register. Instead, the registration and reporting obligations fall entirely on **authorized economic operators** (licensed waste collectors and collection centres) that receive recyclable municipal waste from private individuals.

**Published obligations (from draft HG, under consultation as of 8 May 2026):**
- Authorized operators must **register their facility/collection point on the TRACE-DM platform**, managed by the Administrația Fondului pentru Mediu (AFM).
- Each citizen-to-operator waste handover transaction must be registered electronically in TRACE-DM **within 24 hours**, containing: (a) operator ID data; (b) citizen name, personal identification number (CNP), and identity document details; (c) date and time of transaction; (d) waste type (EU classification code) and exact quantity in kilograms; (e) citizen's own-household-origin declaration; (f) transaction value and payment method.
- For metallic waste (ferrous and non-ferrous), the TRACE-DM system generates the mandatory acquisition receipt (*borderou de achiziție*) electronically, superseding the existing paper format required under OUG 31/2011.
- TRACE-DM operates **separately from the SGR Deposit-Return System** (operated by RetuRO): SGR-covered packaging is excluded from TRACE-DM scope.
- The system will be **interlinked with the Integrated Environmental System (SIM)** for unified government reporting.

**Not yet released (promised but pending):**
- AFM technical specifications and registration procedures for operator onboarding.
- Implementation timeline and phasing schedule post-HG publication in the Official Gazette.
- Quantitative thresholds (operational parameters only, not limits on citizen deliveries) — exact threshold values not yet disclosed in draft.

**Scope of registration:**
All authorized economic operators receiving recyclable municipal waste from private individuals in Romania. Operators handling only B2B waste flows or SGR packaging are excluded from TRACE-DM.

*Source: MMAP Draft HG on TRACE-DM Traceability System, MMAP, 8 May 2026. https://mmediu.ro/en/transparenta/proiecte-acte-normative/ministerul-mediului-apelor-si-padurilor-mmap-supune-consultarii-publice-proiectul-de-hotarare-privind-instituirea-sistemului-electronic-de-trasabilitate-a-fluxurilor-de-deseuri-municipale-reciclabi/ | Secondary: Ecoteca analysis, Ecoteca.ro, 13 May 2026. https://ecoteca.ro/sistemul-trace-dm-trasabilitatea-deseurilor-municipale-reciclabile-predate-populatie.html*
